action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 12 completed training a larger ResMLP (2560 hidden, 6 blocks, ~79M params) with dropout=0.1 for 15 epochs. Validation loss decreased to 0.003327 and validation mean R2 (with low-variance columns zeroed) reached 0.4928. This is higher than the 30-epoch smaller model's final validation R2 (0.4815), suggesting better generalization, but we do not yet have the official test mean_r2 for this checkpoint. Analysis: The model trained successfully and saved to checkpoints/best.pt. We have ~2 hours and 18 iterations remaining. Before deciding on further architecture or training changes, we must evaluate this new checkpoint to see if it beats the current best test score of 0.5206. Decision: Submit evaluation immediately for checkpoints/best.pt using predict.py.
